assertionAssessment.reason: The only completed implementation feature in this milestone has an empty fulfills list in features.json, so no validation-contract assertions are assigned to this milestone.

server.notes: Port 3102 was already occupied by a healthy validation server, so the flow reused it rather than starting a second instance.

checks.name: runtime diagnostics
checks.summary: Validation override reported active seeded bootstrap mode with shared_market_snapshot.available=true and source_class=seeded_bootstrap.

checks.name: simple price seeded payload
checks.summary: Returned populated seeded market fields for bitcoin and ethereum.

checks.name: token price seeded payload
checks.summary: Returned populated seeded payload for the sampled USDC Ethereum contract.

checks.name: coins markets seeded payload
checks.summary: Returned populated canonical rows with current_price, market_cap, market_cap_rank, total_volume, and last_updated.

checks.name: coin detail seeded payload
checks.summary: Returned populated market_data and ticker content for bitcoin, consistent with seeded bootstrap visibility.

setupFindings: No milestone-owned validation-contract assertions are currently assigned to misc-bootstrap-runtime-followups.
An existing validation server on port 3102 was already healthy and exposed seeded bootstrap runtime semantics, so no additional server startup was required.
conclusion: No contract assertions were testable for this milestone, but the real local validation surface did confirm the intended seeded-bootstrap runtime/server behavior for diagnostics, simple price, token price, coins markets, and coin detail.
